purpose: Placeholder 'Make' sub-view inside the Chat tab. Renders a centered empty-state SVG plus a 'Coming soon' message. No state, no IPC, no event handlers — purely a visual stub mounted when chatActiveView === 'make'. Reserved for a future feature surface accessed via the sidebar's Make button.
gotchas: Empty stub — do not assume any 'Make' functionality exists. Code that branches on chatActiveView === 'make' currently just gets this placeholder.
Class names ('chat-make-page', 'chat-make-empty') are styled centrally in src/ui/styles — duplicating them in another empty-state will inherit the Make styling, which may not be desired.
patterns: Empty-state stub pattern: render a low-opacity SVG icon plus heading + subtext, used uniformly across Synapse for placeholder views.
conventions: Inline SVG (no asset file), strokeWidth 1.5, opacity 0.3 — matches the chat dashboard empty-state styling.

related: src/ui/shared/chat/ChatSidebar.jsx (Make button dispatches SET_CHAT_VIEW with view='make')
